description:
Port of fz-aiz.2 from the unmerged `fz-aiz/any-key-floor` branch.

## Repro (errors today)

```fz
fn f([h | rest]) when h > 0, do: rest
fn f([h | rest]), do: [h | rest]
fn main() do
  print(f([-1, 2, 3]))
end
```

Errors with `error[lower/unbound]: unbound: h`.

## Two coordinated bugs

The pattern-check false positive masks the lower-side bug, so fixing
only one breaks fixtures.

### (a) `pattern_matrix::find_unreachable_rows` ignores guards

pattern_matrix.rs:634. Today: compiles the whole matrix, walks the
decision tree, returns BodyIds not reached. Guards are a Row field
that the unreachable check ignores. So clause 2 (`[h | rest]`) is
marked unreachable because clause 1's guarded `[h | rest]` "covers"
it — but a guard can reject at runtime, so this is wrong.

Fix: fast path when no row has a guard (preserves single-compile
cost). With guards: walk rows in order, test each against the
prefix of *unguarded* rows only. Standard ML/Erlang semantics.

### (b) `ir_lower::lower_matrix_list_cons` env leak

ir_lower.rs:1426. Snapshot `env_before` taken at line 1485, used to
filter `pat_bind_extras`. But `ctx.env` / `ctx.env_order` are never
restored across loop iterations — clause N's `h`/`rest` bindings
leak into clause N+1's `env_before`, get filtered out of
`pat_bind_extras`, and lowering emits an unbound reference.

Fix: snapshot `ctx.env` / `ctx.env_order` before the cons-rows loop;
restore before each iteration; final restore after the loop.

## Why both at once

`find_unreachable_rows`'s false positive marks clause 2 unreachable
before lowering tries to emit it — so the lower bug is invisible
until the pattern_check fix lands. Conversely, fixing only the
lower bug leaves the false unreachable warning. Land together.

## Acceptance

- Repro runs and prints `[-1, 2, 3]`.
- pattern_matrix unit tests cover three guard-aware cases:
  1. Guarded prefix doesn't dominate later rows.
  2. Unguarded wildcard still dominates later rows.
  3. Guarded row itself unreachable when its pattern is covered by
     an unguarded predecessor.
- 618 unit + 166 fixture-matrix tests green.
- No goldens shift.
title: fz-rcp.2: pattern_matrix guards + ir_lower env restore (two-bug couple)
